page_content:
HEBR249 Special Topics in Hebrew Studies (1-3 Credits)

A broad range of cultural and societal topics pertaining to the communication of Hebrew.

Prerequisite: Must have completed HEBR206; or HEBR211; or must have appropriate score on Foreign Language Placement Assessment; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
